leadText: Chorizo (Japanese: やきチョリソー Grilled Chorizo) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A very salty and spicy ingredient. This type of sausage has particularly robust salty flavor, and the spicier varieties are extra popular.
